FAQ_SUBTITLE: Everything you need to know about OpenBarber
FAQ_NO_RESULTS_SUBTITLE: Try a different search term or category.
FAQ_CONTACT_SUBTITLE: We are happy to help. Just send us an email.
FAQ_Q_BOOKING_1: How do I book an appointment?
FAQ_A_BOOKING_1: Search for a barbershop near you on the home page or filter page. Open the shop detail page and select a free time slot. You will receive a confirmation email after booking.
FAQ_Q_BOOKING_2: Do I need an account to book?
FAQ_A_BOOKING_2: No! You can book as a guest by providing your name and email address. With an account you can keep track of all your appointments.
FAQ_Q_BOOKING_3: How can I cancel an appointment?
FAQ_A_BOOKING_3: You will find a cancellation link in your confirmation email. If you have an account, you can view and cancel bookings under My Appointments.
FAQ_Q_BOOKING_4: How far in advance can I book?
FAQ_A_BOOKING_4: It depends on the shop. Typically you can book appointments several weeks in advance. Available slots are shown on the shop detail page.
FAQ_Q_BOOKING_5: Will I receive a reminder before my appointment?
FAQ_A_BOOKING_5: You will receive a confirmation email after booking. Automatic reminders are planned for a future version.
FAQ_Q_SERVICES_1: What services are offered on OpenBarber?
FAQ_A_SERVICES_1: Services vary by barbershop. Typical offerings include haircuts, beard grooming, shaving, styling, and coloring.
FAQ_Q_SERVICES_2: Can I book multiple services in one appointment?
FAQ_A_SERVICES_2: Yes, you can select multiple services during booking. Total duration and price are calculated automatically.
FAQ_Q_SERVICES_3: Are the prices on OpenBarber binding?
FAQ_A_SERVICES_3: Prices are maintained by each shop and serve as guidelines. The final price may vary. Please check directly with the shop.
FAQ_Q_ACCOUNT_1: How do I create an account?
FAQ_A_ACCOUNT_1: Click Sign Up in the top right and choose whether you want to register as a customer or shop owner. You can also sign up with Google.
FAQ_Q_ACCOUNT_2: I forgot my password - what should I do?
FAQ_A_ACCOUNT_2: Click Forgot Password on the login page. You will receive an email with a reset link.
FAQ_Q_ACCOUNT_3: How can I edit my profile?
FAQ_A_ACCOUNT_3: After logging in, click your profile picture in the top right and select Edit Profile.
FAQ_A_ACCOUNT_4: Contact us by email at haidepzai.solutions@gmail.com. We will delete your account according to our privacy policy.
FAQ_Q_SHOP_1: How do I register my barbershop on OpenBarber?
FAQ_A_SHOP_1: Create an account and select Shop Owner during registration. After email verification you can set up your shop.
FAQ_Q_SHOP_2: How do I manage my opening hours?
FAQ_A_SHOP_2: In your shop dashboard under Edit Profile you can adjust your opening hours and days.
FAQ_A_SHOP_3: Go to Employees in your dashboard and click Add Employee.
FAQ_A_SHOP_4: Yes, OpenBarber is currently free for shop owners. We are in beta and welcome your feedback.
